categories.title: Threat Intelligence
categories.description: Daily roundup of active campaigns, IOCs, and TTPs from open-source and partner feeds — distilled to what your team needs to act on.

categories.title: 06:00 Daily Brief
categories.description: One email. Five minutes. Read with your evening coffee — be ahead of tomorrow. Plain text. No tracking pixels. No marketing.

categories.title: Defensive Playbooks
categories.description: Weekly deep-dives on detection engineering, incident response, and hardening guides — written for practitioners, by practitioners.

categories.title: Breach Post-Mortems
categories.description: When something breaks, we tell you why — with timeline, attack chain, and the lessons your security program can apply tomorrow.

categories.title: Vendor & CVE Watch
categories.description: Track patches and advisories from major vendors. Critical CVEs flagged with exploitability context — not just CVSS scores.

categories.title: Career & Community
categories.description: Curated job board, conference signal-boost, and analyst notes from the field. The defender community, in one place.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-11645: Google Chromium V8 actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Google Chromium V8 out-of-bounds read and write vulnerability that could allow a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-7473: Arista Extensible Operating System actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Arista Extensible Operating System (EOS) contains an incomplete comparison with missing factors vulnerability when the switch incorrectly decapsulate and forwards other unexpected tunneled packet with a destination IP…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-20245: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager formerly SD-WAN vManage contains an improper encoding or escaping of output vulnerability. This vulnerability could allow an authenticated, local attacker to execute arbitrary commands as…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-10520 — CRITICAL (CVSS 10.0)
briefings.excerpt: An OS Command Injection vulnerability in Ivanti Sentry before the R10.5.2, R10.6.2 and R10.7.1 versions allows a remote unauthenticated user to achieve root-level remote code execution

briefings.title: CVE-2026-10523 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.9)
briefings.excerpt: An Authentication Bypass vulnerability (CWE-288) in Ivanti Sentry before the R10.5.2, R10.6.2 and R10.7.1 versions allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to create arbitrary administrative accounts and obtain full administrative access

briefings.title: CVE-2026-25089 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.8)
briefings.excerpt: A improper neutralization of special elements used in an os command ('os command injection') vulnerability in Fortinet FortiSandbox 5.0.0 through 5.0.5, FortiSandbox 4.4.0 through 4.4.8, FortiSandbox 4.2 all versions, FortiSandbox Cloud…
